headline: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp CarMax Expectations Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
summary: CarMax (NYSE: KMX) will release Q4 earnings on April 14. Analysts expect a decrease in earnings and revenue. Stock rose 2.2% on Wed. Analyst ratings are available on Benzinga.
